description: Literary text, in Arabic script. Fragmentary folio of a historical codex, probably from the biography of the Prophet or a Shīʿī origin work. Mentions Miqdād b. l-Aswad al-Kindī (disciple of the Prophet), Fāṭima (the Prophet's daughter) and refers to the bravery of ʿAlī b. Abī Ṭālib. The narrative on verso is regarding Miqdād acceding to something the Prophet proposed at that very instance.
